body.title: D-pursuit-layer-2026-04-22
body.text:
# Decision rollup — D-pursuit-layer-2026-04-22

**Closed at:** 2026-04-24T00:15:33.796970+00:00
**Ticket count:** 7 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-pursuit-naming-decision (S) — Pursuit — canonical term for goal-bound behavioral units (naming decision)  `done` — Name 'Pursuit' decided by Akien 2026-04-22 ('i like persuit. that's perfect'). Canonical term for goal-bound behavioral units above engrams. Closes on filing per decision design; unblocks design-doc a
- T-pursuit-layer-design-doc (M) — Design doc: Pursuit as Igor's goal-bound behavioral layer above engrams  `done` — Three-layer design doc (Cells → Engrams → Pursuits) with biology refs (Schultz, Graybiel, TOTE, Dickinson-Balleine). Primitives, explains BOREDOM+reply bugs, open questions for test-case ticket. lab/d
- T-pursuit-engram-programming-docs (M) — Engram programming docs: Pursuit as first-class architectural concept  `done` — Programming guide companion to pursuit_layer.md. Goal-is-everywhere principle, wrap/skip criteria, minimal template, two worked examples (reply, BOREDOM-nested), common mistakes section, MVP spec for 
- T-single-pursuit-test-case (M) — Attach Pursuit structure to BOREDOM→scan-for-work→do-ticket chain — prove binding  `done` — Pursuit MVP (cognition/pursuits.py) + BOREDOM chain wrap (boredom_idle.py) + 14 unit tests + observation protocol doc. Gated on IGOR_PURSUITS_ENABLED (default false). Runtime observation deferred to g
- T-bliss-integrator (M) — Bliss-alignment signal — slow integrator on Pursuit completions, feeds milieu  `done` — Stage 1 bliss integrator: EMA over Pursuit completion events (30min window), feeds back to milieu as valence floor-lift + dominance bump. μ-opioid liking counterpart to dopamine wanting (Berridge-Krin
- T-reply-forms-pursuit (S) — Reply-forms-Pursuit: wrap Igor reply action in Pursuit to prevent progress loss  `done` — Wrapped _process_network_msg reply dispatch in Pursuit (parent/child pattern via existing primitives). 8 new tests. Commit 76a3b117. Gated IGOR_PURSUITS_ENABLED.
- T-high-inertia-shared-state (M) — High-inertia gates for shared-state tables (machines, rules) + redirection tactic  `done` — Shipped in 443d00da. Table-level inertia policy in lab/utility_closet/table_inertia.py — asymmetric: empty/sparse (<3 rows) → LOW + redirection msg pointing at fill path; populated (>=10) → HIGH + req

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: unknown.
